class_rates.description: Tax rates for tax classes. You must assign at least one tax rate for each tax class defined on a store.

rate.description: The tax rate that you apply to the items in a tax class.

tax_class_id.description: ID of a tax class. You must associate a tax rate with a tax class. The rate will apply to all the items in this tax class.

enabled.description: Indicates whether a tax rate is enabled. Tax operations are only for enabled zones.

id.description: Tax Rate ID. Internal identifier to update and delete a specific tax rate.

name.description: The human-readable name for this tax zone. The name appears in the store control panel and may be visible to shoppers, depending on store tax settings.

priority.description: Allows for compounding tax rates, common in certain jurisdictions.

tax_zone_id.description: ID of an associated tax zone. You must associate a tax rate with a tax zone.
